description: Dynamically adjust governance entropy thresholds based on thermodynamic phase. In ordered phase, lower threshold allows more accepts. In disordered phase, raise threshold to force more verifies. Derived from +47.6pp selective routing lift.

payload.activation_condition: thermodynamic phase classifier has run and phase is available

ordered.rationale: Ordered phase: 86.9% accuracy. Lower bar for accept is justified.

disordered.rationale: Disordered phase: 28.6% accuracy — below random. Default to verify.

payload.rationale: Selective routing curve shows phase is the strongest accuracy discriminator available. Adaptive thresholds operationalize this signal.

description: When selecting oracle pools, prefer diverse oracles with low inter-correlation (ρ̄ < 0.3). Ablation v1 measured ρ̄=0.219 across llama-3.3-70b, claude-3.5-sonnet, gpt-4o — near-independent, making ensembling meaningful.

payload.rationale: ρ̄=0.219 in ablation v1 indicates oracles are near-independent. Ensembling provides real signal reduction. Using 3 same-family models defeats the purpose.

description: Use epsilon-greedy bandit to select which oracle to query first based on recent per-oracle accuracy. Start with ε=0.2 (20% exploration), decay to ε=0.05 after 500 episodes per oracle.

payload.activation_condition: oracle selection for new governance decision
payload.rationale: Oracle performance varies by domain and time. Bandit selection adapts to current oracle reliability without abandoning exploration.

description: When time budget is constrained (< 500ms), route to single-oracle fast path for low/medium risk. Reserve 2-oracle consensus (p50 ~1.1s) for high/critical. p95 < 4s is acceptable for governance decisions per live benchmark.

payload.activation_condition: time_budget_ms is set in request context
payload.rationale: Live benchmark shows p50=1.1s, p95=3.97s for 2-oracle consensus. Single oracle is ~0.3s. Budget-aware routing allows REMORA to be practical in latency-sensitive contexts.

description: AROMER should run all world-model adaptations in shadow mode for at least 50 episodes before committing threshold changes. This prevents rapid adaptation to adversarial episode distributions.

payload.activation_condition: any world-model threshold change triggered by adapt()
payload.rationale: Safety invariant: large trust reductions in critical domains need shadow validation. This operationalizes that invariant as an adaptive strategy.
